title: malus × gloriosa
intro: Malus × gloriosa, also known as the 'Pink Queen' crabapple, is a hybrid ornamental tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family, resulting from the cross between Malus domestica and Malus baccata. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Malus × gloriosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The herbal preparations of Malus × gloriosa can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
